root.sql:
SELECT current_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no))||' ( '|| trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no)||' ) ' as member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as principal_balance , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock + sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt as share_bal
, (CASE sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE share_amount END) as period_share
, ( select coalesce( sum( principal_balance - pending_amount ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as loan_bal
, ( select coalesce( sum( (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount END) ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_contract where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as loan_period
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) --and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '058005' ) ) /*WHERE*/
